items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for entry/exit tracking.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Entry/exit tracking' feature, but the evidence provided does not confirm its implementation. While the use case outlines the need for entry and exit tracking, there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that this functionality is operational or tested. The prior step evidence focuses on bookings and member interactions without addressing the specific requirement of tracking entry and exit, leading to an inconclusive status.
